description_long: This is a dark, military-style single-propeller airplane with a streamlined fuselage and a camouflage paint scheme. The wings are straight and mid-mounted, with red star insignias on both the fuselage and tail, suggesting Soviet or Russian origin. The cockpit is positioned just behind the nose, featuring a single-seat, open canopy design. The tail section is conventional, with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers. The landing gear is of the taildragger type, with two main wheels under the wings and a small tail wheel. The propeller is mounted at the nose, and the overall build appears to be primarily metal, typical of mid-20th-century fighter aircraft.
description: A dark, camouflaged single-propeller military airplane with red star insignias, mid-mounted straight wings, and a conventional tail. The cockpit is open and positioned just behind the nose, with taildragger landing gear visible.
description_view_0: Side view showing the camouflage body, red star insignias, open cockpit, and taildragger landing gear.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the propeller, narrow fuselage, and straight wings with visible camouflage pattern.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with clear visibility of the cockpit, red star insignias, and tail structure.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the single vertical stabilizer, horizontal stabilizers, and the tail wheel.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Mid-wing configuration with straight, unswept wings and no visible winglets or dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: Single nose-mounted piston engine with a two-blade propeller.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and two horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Taildragger configuration with two main wheels and a single tail wheel, fixed gear.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, open single-seat cockpit located just behind the nose, with a minimal canopy.
